---
title: "The Rev. Canon Francis Dyson"
---

## The Rev. Canon Francis Dyson

**Dates:** (1784/5-1858)

### Description

Rector of North and South Tedworth. brother of the Rev. Charles Dyson, Rector of Dogmersfield.

### Biography

In the 1851 census Canon Dyson was living in Great Malvern.

### Letters

- Letter from Sept 21 [1868[[footnote:1]]]
- Letter from April 21 1857

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
